items.title: Metrics dashboard update
items.description:
More updates needed on the metrics dashboard:
- The metrics dashboard should also show the total time it took the agent to complete overall.
- The heatmap should show white squares for empty slots instead of black with gray border, and make the overall heatmap a little smaller.
- The heatmap should be monthly and should allow user to navigate for last 12 months. 
- Tasks created shows 0 on its card while completed shows 8. 
- The hours saved should reflect based on agent completed time.

items.title: Task efforts updates
items.description:
The task efforts updates should happen on every save for title or description field and not the other fields. The description should give more context so based on this the extension shold decide with the help of agent that how much efforts it will take for a human to work with agents to complete it. It should consider factors like adding a task, description, running the agent to work on the task, doing the validation after the task is completed and determine the total efforts. 

Also remove the remaining and completed as its not really of any use.

items.title: Update editing item layout
items.description:
The edit panel for a todo item is very bland in design. It needs to be improved
- Improve the design
- Show a colorful progress icon
- Show save, run buttons ton top with icons.
- utilize the agent related fields all in one line instead of using one control on each line. 
- Provide a usage symbol after estimation that suggests weather it requires high reasoning or low reasoning.
- if the task is completed, the status should be colorful.
